title: Senior Financial Analyst - Scripbox - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Scripbox - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox:
Scripbox is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox!
